actualKeyboardRoute: start slope -> double wall climb -> buried rise -> uneven tunnel -> three dash-break gates -> high gallery -> pass 06 exit
limitations: Only zones 01 through 05 have playable collision in pass 06.
The remaining five zones are still blueprint data.
The broad collapse corridor is reserved geometry; no boulder is active before pass 08.
Graybox shapes are collision prototypes, not final terrain art.
